description_long: This is a modern bungalow complex consisting of two main rectangular structures connected by a covered bridge over a landscaped area. The left building is multi-storied with large glass windows, balconies, and a rooftop terrace, while the right building is a single-story structure with a flat roof and wide windows. The complex is set on landscaped green patches with a winding path and a small circular patio area near the bridge. The exterior is predominantly white and gray, with clean lines and minimalistic detailing, emphasizing a contemporary architectural style. The bridge features railings and provides a functional and aesthetic connection between the two buildings. The overall design suggests a luxurious, open-plan living space with ample natural light and outdoor integration.
description: A modern, multi-structure bungalow complex with flat roofs, large windows, and a connecting bridge set on landscaped grounds. The design features clean lines, white and gray exteriors, and a blend of multi-story and single-story elements.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the two main buildings connected by a bridge, highlighting the multi-story left structure and the single-story right structure with landscaped surroundings.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the rear and side of the complex, emphasizing the bridge connection and the back facades of both buildings.
description_view_2: View 2 focuses on the right building and the bridge, with the left building seen from the rear, showcasing the flat roofs and patio area.
description_view_3: View 3 highlights the front and side of the left building, showing its balconies, rooftop terrace, and the landscaped entry area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and balcony doors
